sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; const About: React.FC = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'technician' | 'features' | 'benefits'>('technician'); return (

EV Smart Maintenance System

Diagnostic and maintenance platform for electric vehicle service professionals

{/* Tab Navigation */}
{/* Technician Workflow Content */} {activeTab === 'technician' && (

How Technicians Use Our Platform

01

Secure Authentication

Technicians log in with role-based credentials to access their personalized dashboard, displaying assigned vehicles and pending service requests.

02

Vehicle Health Assessment

Access comprehensive diagnostic reports including battery degradation analysis, charging cycle history, thermal management data, and motor efficiency metrics.

03

Predictive Issue Detection

Review system-generated alerts for potential component failures before they occur, allowing proactive maintenance scheduling and reduced vehicle downtime.

04

Maintenance Work Order Management

Create, assign, and track work orders through completion. Update status in real-time and add service notes for team collaboration.

05

Parts & Documentation Access

Search manufacturer specifications, wiring diagrams, torque specifications, and replacement part numbers directly from the platform.

06

Customer Service Reporting

Generate professional service reports with detailed findings, completed repairs, parts replaced, and recommended future maintenance schedules.

"The EV Smart Maintenance System has reduced our diagnostic time by 40% and helped us identify battery issues before they left vehicles stranded. This is the standard tool for our service center."

- Michael Torres, Senior EV Technician, ChargeWorks Auto
)} {/* Features Content */} {activeTab === 'features' && (

Enterprise Features for Professional EV Service

01

Real-Time Diagnostics

Live battery health monitoring including state of charge, cell voltage balancing, internal resistance, and thermal management system performance.

02

Predictive Maintenance Alerts

Machine learning algorithms analyze vehicle data to predict component failures 30-90 days in advance, enabling proactive service scheduling.

03

Work Order Management

Full lifecycle work order tracking from initial diagnostic to final quality control check, including parts inventory integration.

04

Technical Documentation Library

Searchable database of manufacturer service bulletins, repair procedures, wiring schematics, and component specifications.

05

Multi-Vehicle Fleet Management

Track maintenance history across entire fleets with VIN-based record keeping and service interval compliance monitoring.

06

Compliance & Safety Reporting

Generate reports that meet manufacturer warranty requirements and safety inspection standards.

)} {/* Benefits Content */} {activeTab === 'benefits' && (

Why Service Centers Choose Our Platform

40% Faster Diagnostics

Technicians spend less time troubleshooting and more time completing repairs with automated diagnostic workflows.

Reduced Vehicle Downtime

Predictive alerts allow service centers to schedule repairs before vehicles break down, keeping fleets operational.

Improved First-Time Fix Rate

Access to complete vehicle history and manufacturer specifications ensures correct repairs on the first attempt.

Enhanced Customer Trust

Professional service reports with detailed findings build transparency and confidence with vehicle owners.

Scalable Fleet Support

From single-bay shops to multi-location fleet operations, the platform grows with your business needs.

Warranty Compliance

Maintain detailed service records required for manufacturer warranty validation and EV battery coverage.

)}
); }; export default About;
